/usr/bin/g++ CMakeFiles/cute_tutorial_03_mma_tma_multicast_sm100.dir/03_mma_tma_multicast_sm100.cu.o -o cute_tutorial_03_mma_tma_multicast_sm100  -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN' -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN/../lib64' -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN/../lib' -Wl,-rpath,'/usr/local/cuda/lib64' -Wl,-rpath,'/usr/local/cuda/lib' -ldl -lcuda -lcudadevrt -lcudart  -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
